description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & publish PyPI packages that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]+.** and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have four jobs: Make SDist, build, upload_to_test_pypy, and upload_to_pypi. The Make SDist and build jobs should run in parallel on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with Python 3.10, creating source distributions and building wheels respectively. The upload_to_test_pypy and upload_to_pypi jobs should upload artifacts to test PyPI and PyPI respectively, with the latter only running on release publication.
